question: How many drivers have not driven any cars?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM driver WHERE Driver_ID NOT IN (SELECT Driver_ID FROM vehicle_driver)

back_translation.intent: 统计不包含在某个关联表中的记录数量
filters: Driver_ID NOT IN (SELECT Driver_ID FROM vehicle_driver)

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题询问的是没有驾驶任何车辆的司机数量，SQL反向翻译描述通过Driver_ID NOT IN子查询准确表达了这一意图。
